TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[494.610-518.200] interviewee: in the medical corps. But they put me here that I had to serve.
[518.200-550.560] interviewee: And this was fine. I said goodbye at night. I returned to the barracks. And after about, I would say, four or five weeks, I was called to the general of the division in Krakow. My God, what did I do? I didn't do nothing. I didn't commit any crimes. And he tells me, from tomorrow on, you go by streetcar every morning to the hospital, to the pharmacy, and there you will be doing your duty.
